transcript.text:
People call this place the "Land-Tteok"
It's because it's in front of a Landrover store
[City of Yeongju's most famous tteokbokki stand]
The grill is like this big! I've never seen anything like it
[It's living up to its name!]
5,000 Won worth, please (~$4.47 USD)
Another order of 5,000 Won, please
Another one with an order of boiled egg, please
10,000 Won worth, please
[Please stop eating]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Yeongju today
This place is mainly known for the spicy chewy noodles
But I'm here to try their famous tteokbokki stand (spicy rice cake)
It's inside the market
They call it "Land-Tteok" because it's in front of a Landrover store

They shortened Landrover Tteokbokki to Land-Tteok
Let's go ahead
It's made with the long traditional rice cake (tteok)
It's really in front of the store
[The street vendor got permission from the city to do business here]
Hello
Yes, hello
The menu
[Their prices have went up to 400 Won per piece starting 4/20/2021] 1,000 Won per 3 pieces of tteoks (~$0.89 USD)
Then how many should I get?
[Not many]
Excuse me,
I will take 5,000 Won worth, please
You don't need to give me the veggies
You need vegetables!
I don't like it Really?

I got you
Thank you
Do you sell fried snacks too?
3 seaweed rolls and 3 dumplings, please
There aren't any stores that sell tteokboki for 1,000 Won
It's spicy
That's hot!
That's scorching hot
It's really good
I can see why it's popular
The traditional rice cake is very chewy
Here's cold water Thank you
The sauce is something I've never had before
Let's try the fishcake
That's a tasty fishcake
But it's spicy

It's a numbing kind of spice
Let's wrap the rice cake with the fishcake
Really delicious
The fried snack is not crispy
It's almost like bread
Fishcake soup
Tasty
It's spicy, but it's a good type of feeling
The spice level is right at about how much I can tolerate
[Wipes sauce off]
[You can't forget about the fishcake soup]
Excuse me, do I just take them from here? Yes
Bon appetit
It's so hot
This soup is lava
It's a chewy fishcake

It's good but so spicy
Yummy
It's spicy
But I keep going back for it
It also has cabbage and green onion
[Vegetables]
I've never seen a tteokboki grill that big
It's like this big!
Why is it so big?
I need to order more
The sauce is amazing
The spiciness stacks up And it's addicting
How can I explain this?
How many tteokboki pieces do normal people eat to get full?
The tteok size is just about right
The market is totally empty

There are not many people walking around
I think most are here for this tteokboki stand
[A quiet market alley]
[A crowded food stand]
Did they come to the market for this?
Excuse me,
Another order of 5,000 Won, please
You're eating a lot
It's okay Is it tasty?
Yes it is
It must suit your taste
She's good at eating
Thank you
It's hot
I will eat slowly
1 more fishcake skewer

I also own a tteokboki restaurant
Where?
It's in Seoul What kind of tteokboki?
Just tteokboki
Seafood tteokboki
Seafood?
It's only been open for 2 months
How long has this been here? 28 years
We're... 2 months!
Fried dumpling
I wonder how it will taste
It's really like bread and not fried food
The seaweed roll too
Very unique
Spicy but good
I might go insane

So good at eating
Delicious
You guys have boiled eggs?
May I have an order of 5,000 Won with boiled eggs?
[3rd tray] Thank you
Egg!
That looks so good
I can't scoop it
That's terrible
Fishcake
Dip it in soy sauce
So hot
It's hot and spicy
I can't take this anymore
Milk neutralizes it right away
I'm going to cry

I must eat another fishcake skewer because of the spiciness
1 good thing about having short hair is that it's much more convenient to eat
I would have had my hair all over the food here
It would've been a mess
I better set them aside for them to cool off
[Cooling down 3 skewers]
Many will think that the sauce will not blend well with the rice cake because it's so big
But it's well cooked
[Last fishcake skewer]
1 more 5,000 Won worth And it will be 20,000 Won total
Thank you
The number of rice cake and fishcake is 60
Yum
But it's spicy
My tongue can't take it anymore
Milk only helped in the beginning

It's starting to not work
No, it's not paused
[Faints]
Really, I'm not even close to getting full yet
But it's just too spicy
I'm scared to eat more
I'll end the mukbang here with this small meal
I'll to-go the rest home
I think I can eat 5,000 or 10,000 Won worth in the morning still
Let's take some home
Excuse me,
It's just too spicy for me
Can I take these home? Yes
And also an order of 10,000 Won worth with this
[Calculating the price]
35,000 Won total (~$31.28 USD)
